reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, los playeros me hicieron esperar cuando no había gente en la playa. Pocas ganas de trabajar. No se compara con la atención de otras YPF

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendants made me wait even though there were no other people on the beach. They clearly didn't seem to want to work. It's nothing like the service at other YPF stations.
